title: CUB Banking Reimagined
subtitle: Innovating CUB's mobile banking for India's evolving digital landscape.
problem_statement: CUB's current mobile app offers standard features, but lacks personalized, proactive financial guidance for diverse Indian users.

pillars.title: Security Trust
pillars.insight: Users fear data breaches and transaction errors in digital banking.

pillars.title: Financial Control
pillars.insight: Users want clear oversight of their spending and savings.

pillars.title: Seamless Efficiency
pillars.insight: Users seek quick, frictionless banking operations on mobile.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: HMW make banking proactive, not reactive?
HMW empower users to achieve financial goals?
HMW integrate AI for personalized financial insights?

data.name: HDFC Bank
cons: App can feel cluttered, less innovative.

points.name: HDFC Bank
points.desc: High trust, traditional features, moderate innovation.

points.name: ICICI Bank
points.desc: Good features, moderate innovation, established trust.

points.name: Paytm
points.desc: High innovation, payment focused, moderate trust.

points.name: CUB (Current)
points.desc: Regional bank, high trust, basic digital features.

solution.name: CUB NextGen
solution.desc: Personalized, proactive financial guidance for users.

personas.name: Rohan Sharma
personas.quote: I need quick, secure ways to manage daily expenses.
personas.bio: Tech-savvy professional managing family finances, seeks efficient digital solutions for banking.

personas.name: Priya Singh
personas.quote: I want to save smartly and track my spending.
personas.bio: Young professional focused on budgeting and saving for future goals, values convenience.

insights: "How do I pay all my bills easily?"
I need to track daily expenses better.
Is this app easy to navigate for all tasks?
Can I trust this bank with my financial future?
Taps 'View All Accounts' to check balance.

points.action: Replace static account view with dynamic, personalized financial dashboard.
points.benefit: Offers personalized insights, improves user engagement.

points.action: Integrate bill payments with smart reminders and budgeting tools.
points.benefit: Streamlines financial management, reduces missed payments.

points.action: Adopt AI-driven insights for spending patterns and savings goals.
points.benefit: Provides actionable advice, fosters financial literacy.

points.action: Enhance 'Instant Fund Transfer' with voice commands and QR code.
points.benefit: Increases speed and accessibility for diverse users.

pivot.before: Generic, transactional banking interface with limited user guidance and insights.
pivot.pivot_logic: Shift from a 'bank account viewer' to a 'personal financial assistant' using AI and intuitive design.
pivot.after: Proactive, intelligent financial platform offering personalized insights and seamless control.

annotations.title: Account Card
annotations.rationale: Prominent display of primary account, but lacks quick actions.

annotations.title: Fund Transfer
annotations.rationale: Quick access to recent contacts, but input field is basic.

annotations.title: Service Grid
annotations.rationale: 'At your Fingertips' provides common services, could be smarter.

data.finding: Balance hidden by default, requires tap to reveal.
Iconography varies slightly across different sections.
Fund transfer amount field allows '00.00' input.
No customization options for dashboard layout.
